title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
